intro: Calochortus eubellatus, commonly known as the golden-star, is a perennial plant species belonging to the lily family (Liliaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and respiratory issues, due to its purported health benefits. Bioactive constituents of Calochortus eubellatus include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is typically used to prepare herbal supplements, teas, and tinctures, which are available in some health food stores and online, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
